title: An Alien's Perspective
description: An Alien’s Perspective is a lightweight optimisation-focused Vanilla+ pack. It keeps Minecraft fully vanilla while improving performance, visuals and animations through small client-friendly enhancements.
body:
**An Alien’s Perspective** is a lightweight Vanilla+ optimisation pack designed to improve performance, visuals and overall smoothness across Fabric, NeoForge and Forge. It keeps Minecraft fully vanilla while enhancing FPS, animations, lighting and quality‑of‑life features.

# **Performance & Optimisation**
Enjoy a smoother experience with powerful optimisation mods such as Sodium/Embeddium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, EntityCulling, MoreCulling, ImmediatelyFast and Dynamic FPS. These dramatically improve framerate, reduce stutter and optimise resource usage on all supported loaders.

# **Visual Enhancements**
Experience a more atmospheric world with Iris Shaders (BSL/AstraLex), enhanced lighting and improved visibility. Fresh Animations, 3D textures, Skin Layers 3D and other visual upgrades add depth and detail without changing gameplay.

# **Quality‑of‑Life Improvements**
AppleSkin, Better Third Person, Zoomify, Better Statistics Screen, MiniHUD and other QoL mods make the game more intuitive and enjoyable while keeping the core gameplay untouched. WorldEdit is included for advanced building and world manipulation.



**Follow the project to get notified about new updates.**

Full modlists for Fabric, NeoForge and Forge are included below.

## **Important Disclaimer:**

If this modpack is currently in a Beta or Alpha version, please be aware that some mods may be missing. This typically occurs when mods have not yet been updated to the specific version of Minecraft this pack targets.
